cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir! This is Rohan from Nextra Broadband. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm good, thanks. Who's calling and what's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We have a scheduled appointment for a new broadband installation at your address, sir. I just wanted to confirm the details with you. Can you please confirm your address, Achha?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, it's 14, Lake View Apartments. What time was the appointment for?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, that's correct, sir! The appointment is scheduled for 3 PM today. Will that time work for you, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, that's fine. I'll be available at 3 PM. Haan, that's all, right?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 39s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A technician from [INTERNET_PROVIDER] calls a customer to confirm a scheduled appointment for a new installation. They confirm the address and the agreed-upon time slot.
